name: Accordion
description: Vertical stack of expandable rows. Each item exposes a trigger header (label + auto-rendered trailing chevron that rotates 180° on expand) and a content body that paints below it when open. Two modes select how many items can be open at once: `type='single'` (one open at a time — collapsible by default) and `type='multiple'` (any number open). Rows tile flush with a hairline `outlineVariant` divider between them. Single-spec family.
useCases: long-form content carved into scannable sections
